rows.name: baseline-default
rows.description: Default bssl fingerprint — no JA4 config, pure upstream BoringSSL output.
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Connected.
  Version: TLSv1.3
  Resumed session: no
  Cipher: TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
  ECDHE group: X25519
  Signature algorithm: ecdsa_secp256r1_sha256
  Secure renegotiation: yes
  Extended master secret: yes
  Next protocol negotiated: 
  ALPN protocol: 
  OCSP staple: no
  SCT list: no
  Early data: no
  Encrypted ClientHello: no
  Cert subject: CN = ja4.nurker

rows.name: replay-baseline-exact
rows.description: Exact replay of the observed default bssl fingerprint.
rows.config:
strict=1
tls_min=1.2
tls_max=1.3
enable_grease=0
enable_ch_xtn_permutation=0
cipher_mode=exact
cipher_suites=4865,4866,4867,49195,49199,49196,49200,52393,52392,49161,49171,49162,49172,156,157,47,53
alpn=h2,http/1.1
supported_versions=772,771
supported_groups=29,23,24
key_share_groups=29
psk_key_exchange_modes=1
signature_algorithms=1027,2052,1025,1283,2053,1281,2054,1537,513
extension_mode=exact
extension_order=0,23,65281,10,11,35,13,51,45,43
sni_mode=present
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Error while connecting: Undefined error: 0

rows.name: exact-compact-tls13
rows.description: Exact TLS 1.3-only profile: only three TLS 1.3 ciphers, minimal extensions.
rows.config:
strict=1
tls_min=1.2
tls_max=1.3
enable_grease=0
enable_ch_xtn_permutation=0
cipher_mode=exact
cipher_suites=4865,4866,4867
alpn=h2,http/1.1
supported_versions=772,771
supported_groups=29,23,24
key_share_groups=29
psk_key_exchange_modes=1
signature_algorithms=1027,2052,1283,2053
extension_mode=exact
extension_order=0,10,13,16,51,45,43,23,65281
sni_mode=present
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Connected.
  Version: TLSv1.3
  Resumed session: no
  Cipher: TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
  ECDHE group: X25519
  Signature algorithm: ecdsa_secp256r1_sha256
  Secure renegotiation: yes
  Extended master secret: yes
  Next protocol negotiated: 
  ALPN protocol: http/1.1
  OCSP staple: no
  SCT list: no
  Early data: no
  Encrypted ClientHello: no
  Cert subject: CN = ja

rows.name: exact-http1-tls12only
rows.description: TLS 1.2 max, HTTP/1.1 only ALPN, reduced cipher list.
rows.config:
strict=1
tls_min=1.2
tls_max=1.2
enable_grease=0
enable_ch_xtn_permutation=0
cipher_mode=exact
cipher_suites=49195,49199,49196,49200,49171,49172,156,157,47,53
alpn=http/1.1
supported_versions=771
supported_groups=29,23,24
key_share_groups=29
signature_algorithms=1027,2052,1283,2053,1281,2054
extension_mode=exact
extension_order=0,10,11,35,13,23,65281
sni_mode=present
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Error while connecting: Undefined error: 0

rows.name: reorder-cipher-prefix
rows.description: Reorder: put ChaCha20 and AES-256 first before default ordering.
rows.config:
tls_min=1.2
tls_max=1.3
enable_grease=0
cipher_mode=reorder
cipher_suites=4867,4866,49196,49200
sni_mode=present
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Connected.
  Version: TLSv1.3
  Resumed session: no
  Cipher: TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
  ECDHE group: X25519
  Signature algorithm: ecdsa_secp256r1_sha256
  Secure renegotiation: yes
  Extended master secret: yes
  Next protocol negotiated: 
  ALPN protocol: 
  OCSP staple: no
  SCT list: no
  Early data: no
  Encrypted ClientHello: no
  Cert subject: CN = ja4.

rows.name: reorder-ext-prefix
rows.description: Reorder: put sigalgs and supported_versions first in extension list.
rows.config:
tls_min=1.2
tls_max=1.3
enable_grease=0
extension_mode=reorder
extension_order=13,43,51,45,10
sni_mode=present
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Connected.
  Version: TLSv1.3

  Early data: no

rows.name: exact-chromium-like
rows.description: Chromium/BoringSSL default profile from chromium-boringssl-ja4.yaml: TLS 1.3 preferred, h2+http/1.1, standard Chromium extension set.
rows.config:
strict=1
tls_min=1.2
tls_max=1.3
enable_grease=0
enable_ch_xtn_permutation=0
cipher_mode=exact
cipher_suites=4865,4866,4867,49195,49199,49196,49200,52393,52392,49161,49171,49162,49172,156,157,47,53
alpn=h2,http/1.1
supported_versions=772,771
supported_groups=29,23,24
key_share_groups=29
psk_key_exchange_modes=1
signature_algorithms=1027,2052,1025,1283,2053,1281,2054,1537,513
extension_mode=exact
extension_order=0,23,65281,10,11,35,16,5,18,51,43,13,45,27
sni_mode=present
rows.stderr_snippet:
Connecting to 193.23.161.102:443
Error while connecting: Undefined error: 0
